name: app_notify
description: Manage app notifications that appear in your system prompt. Write a notification to make it persistently visible across activations, clear it when done, or list all active notifications. Notifications live in core/apps/<app>.md and are injected as an 'App Notifications' block in the system prompt on every activation.

action.description: Action to perform: 'write' to create/update a notification, 'clear' to remove one, 'list' to show all.

app.description: App name (used as filename, e.g. 'weather' → core/apps/weather.md). Required for write and clear.

content.description: Markdown content for the notification. Required for write.
